summary: Iteration 50 - Tested 3 new features: DUO warning modal, Churn calculation, Auto-generate reviews. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: DUO warning modal appears on edit/delete with correct title 'Membre DUO', warning text, and buttons ('Modifier quand même'/'Supprimer quand même'). Dashboard shows churn_rate=4.4% for March 2026. AnnualReviewsPage has 'Générer bilans auto' and 'Envoyer rappels' buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: DUO warning modal correctly triggers on edit/delete for is_duo=true members (MembersPage.js lines 672-696)
Churn calculation in kpis.py enriches monthly KPIs with real lost_members from exit_dates (lines 17-33)
Auto-generate reviews endpoint returns correct structure: created, skipped, total_eligible (annual_reviews.py lines 146-228)
No members have annual_review_enabled=True, so auto-generate returns 0 created - expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified 3 features: 1) DUO warning modal appears when editing/deleting DUO members (is_duo=true). Modal shows title 'Membre DUO' with edit warning 'délier les deux membres DUO' or delete warning 'Suppression DUO'. Buttons: 'Annuler' and 'Modifier quand même'/'Supprimer quand même'. Test with member 'Jessica Snoeckx'. 2) Churn calculation works - GET /api/monthly-kpis returns lost_members and churn_rate enriched from member exit_dates. March 2026 has 5 lost members and 4.42% churn. 3) Auto-generate reviews POST /api/annual-reviews/auto-generate works, returns {created, skipped, total_eligible}. Currently 0 eligible since no members have annual_review_enabled=True. Frontend buttons 'Générer bilans auto' and 'Envoyer rappels' exist on AnnualReviewsPage.

duo_warning_modal_edit.details: Modal title 'Membre DUO', warning about 'délier les deux membres DUO', button 'Modifier quand même'

duo_warning_modal_delete.details: Modal title 'Membre DUO', warning 'Suppression DUO' with 'délier la paire DUO', button 'Supprimer quand même'

churn_calculation.details: March 2026 shows lost_members=5, churn_rate=4.42% based on member exit_dates

frontend_auto_generate_btn.details: Button 'Générer bilans auto' exists on AnnualReviewsPage and calls endpoint

dashboard_churn_display.details: Dashboard shows 'TAUX DE CHURN' = 4.4% for March 2026
